columns.extraction_plan: The text states "94% newly-diagnosed". This implies that 94% of patients had synchronous metastases. Therefore, for the SOC + AAP treatment arm, it can be inferred that 466 patients (93%) had synchronous metastases (Table 1, page 5).

columns.extraction_plan: The text states "94% newly-diagnosed". This implies that 94% of patients had synchronous metastases. Therefore, for the SOC-alone control arm, it can be inferred that 475 patients (95%) had synchronous metastases (Table 1, page 5).

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Metachronous | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The text states "Relapsing 27 (5%)" for the SOC-alone group and "Relapsing 35 (7%)" for the SOC + AAP group. This implies that 5% and 7% of patients had metachronous metastases. Therefore, for the SOC + AAP treatment arm, 35 patients (7%) had metachronous metastases (Table 1, page 5).
